name: eager-l3-cold-launch
description: Phase M1 follow-up (post Move 2 — 2026-05-25). Seeds localStorage with the Ollama (gemma4:e4b) provider, triggers `Reload` action to retrigger GRAPH_LOAD, waits 60s for the eager sweep to fire + at least one extraction to land. Asserts the dev-test report contains '[RagOrchestrator] eager L3 sweep: enqueued N of M' with N > 0. Mirrors the puppeteer smoke at `Qualia/scripts/smoke-eager-l3.mjs`. Side effect (used by warm-launch which runs next): populates `examples/sample/.qualia.rag/behavior-cache.json` with at least 1 extraction entry.

commands: (() => { localStorage.setItem('qualia.landingShown', 'true'); localStorage.setItem('qualia.extraction.provider', JSON.stringify({ id: 'ollama', config: { baseUrl: 'http://localhost:11434', model: 'gemma4:e4b' } })); return 'seeded'; })()

actions.command: (async () => { const r = await window.__qualiaRunDevTests(); const m = r.match(/eager L3 sweep: enqueued (\d+) of (\d+)/); if (!m) { const excerpt = r.length > 800 ? r.slice(0, 800) + '...' : r; throw new Error('cold-launch sweep log not found. report excerpt: ' + excerpt); } if (Number(m[1]) === 0) throw new Error('sweep enqueued 0 nodes — expected N > 0 for cold-launch. log: ' + m[0]); return 'sweep verified: ' + m[0]; })()

(() => { const b = document.createElement('div'); b.id = 'canary-eager-l3-badge'; b.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:8px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#2a7;color:#fff;padding:6px 14px;font-family:monospace;z-index:99999;font-size:14px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:bold;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);'; b.textContent = 'PASS cold-launch sweep fired'; document.body.appendChild(b); return true; })()
